examples: Then another cousin, Arno Lustiger, bent over the coffin to recite Kaddish.
The man turned around, and Rabbi Ben Kaddish smashed him in the back of the head with a candlestick.
The Kaddish is a prayer that praises God and expresses a yearning for the establishment of God's kingdom on earth.
Thus, Columbus' subterfuge allowed his sons to say Kaddish for their crypto-Jewish father when he died.
During the service, survivors recited a psalm and a Kaddish prayer for the dead as they lit candles and laid wreaths.
